changeSet.author: cursor
changeSet.comment: Restore built-in admin access and visibility defaults.
changeSet.sql: insert into jhi_user_authority (user_id, authority_name) select id, 'ROLE_ADMIN' from jhi_user where login = 'admin' and not exists ( select 1 from jhi_user_authority where user_id = jhi_user.id and authority_name = 'ROLE_ADMIN' );

insert into jhi_user_authority (user_id, authority_name) select id, 'ROLE_USER' from jhi_user where login = 'admin' and not exists ( select 1 from jhi_user_authority where user_id = jhi_user.id and authority_name = 'ROLE_USER' );
